name: S-2 high-fragility-tier silent-replace strategy overwrites the cache file with fresh upstream content per the architecture
command: mkdir -p cache && printf 'old' > cache/x.html && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\necho "new content fresh"\n' > up.sh && chmod +x up.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetcher.sh" --source-id x --fragility-tier high --strategy silent-replace --upstream-stub ./up.sh --cache cache && grep -q 'new content fresh' cache/x.html && echo replaced 1>&2
